- Around 250 missing after refugee boat capsizes in Andaman Sea: UN agencies
- About 250 missing after boat carrying Rohingya refugees capsizes in Andaman Sea
- About 250 missing after boat carrying Rohingya refugees capsizes in Andaman Sea
- Around 250 missing after Rohingya boat capsizes in Andaman Sea, UN agencies say
- Around 250 people feared missing after boat capsizes in Andaman Sea: UN
- About 250 people feared missing after boat capsizes in Andaman Sea: UN
- Around 250 missing after Rohingya boat capsizes in Andaman Sea, UN agencies say
- 250 Bangladeshis, Rohingyas feared 'missing' after boat capsizes in Bay]]>

item.title: No ships ‘make it past US blockade’ in Hormuz strait in first day: Pentagon
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Not a single ship from Iran overcame US blockade, CENTCOM says
- US Centcom says no ships passed through first day of US Hormuz blockade
- Iran war: Strait of Hormuz traffic barely affected on first day of US blockade, data shows
- US military says no ships made in past blockade in first day
- CENTCOM Says No Ships Passed Iran Port Blockade in First 24 Hours
- Flash: U.S. military executing mission to blockade ships entering and departing Iranian ports -- CENTCOM]]>

item.title: Hezbollah says it launched drones at Israeli military in occupied Golan Heights
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Hezbollah says it targeted Israeli forces near border
- Israeli Hermes 450 drone taken down by Hezbollah missile in southern Lebanon
- Hezbollah launches ‘hard-to-detect’ drone for first time: Israeli broadcaster]]>

item.title: Super Typhoon Sinlaku bears down on Northern Mariana Islands, Guam
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Super Typhoon Sinlaku is pounding the remote Northern Mariana Islands in the Pacific Ocean
- Powerful super typhoon takes aim at remote U.S. islands in Pacific
- Super Typhoon Sinlaku pounds remote US islands in the Pacific Ocean with ferocious winds
- Super Typhoon Sinlaku: US Northern Mariana Islands’ and Guam’s rapidly intensifying storm
- Northern Mariana Islands, Guam On Alert for ‘Extremely Dangerous’ Super Typhoon Sinlaku
- Northern Mariana Islands, Guam On Alert for ‘Extremely Dangerous’ Super Typhoon Sinlaku
- Monster typhoon in the Pacific Ocean is bearing down on group of remote US islands]]>

item.title: Russia’s Oil Export Revenue Surged in March, IEA Says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Russian Oil Revenues Nearly Doubled in March
- Russian Oil Revenues Nearly Doubled in March
- Russia's oil export revenue surged to $19bn in March during Mideast war
- Russia’s oil revenues nearly double to $19 billion in March: IEA
- Russia’s oil exports up to 7.13 mbd in March, revenues nearly double — IEA]]>

item.title: Toddler among four killed in Israeli strike in Gaza
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- 4 Palestinians killed in Israeli airstrike west of Gaza City
- Gaza civil defence says toddler among 4 dead in Israeli strike
- Israeli strike on police vehicle in Gaza kills 4, including child
- 4 Palestinians killed in Israeli airstrike on Gaza police vehicle
- Gaza civil defence says toddler among 4 dead in Israeli strike
- Israeli strike hits police car in Gaza, killing four, medics say]]>
